<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Uid\Factory; use Symfony\Component\Uid\Ulid; class UlidFactory { public function create(?\DateTimeInterface $time = null): Ulid { return new Ulid(null === $time ? null : Ulid::generate($time)); } }
